Meta.servicesDescription: From a one-off Python script to a full AI workforce: automations, API integrations, Telegram & Discord bots, web scraping and modern web apps. Delivered in days.

Pricing.title: Launch pricing, transparent from day one
Pricing.subtitle: Fixed-scope projects or a monthly retainer. Always in CHF, no hidden fees.

Guarantee.label: My guarantee
Guarantee.text: First workflow delivered in 5 days — or your money back.

HowIWork.title: Simple, fast, transparent
HowIWork.subtitle: From your brief to a system that runs without you — no jargon, no surprises.
HowIWork.step1Desc: Describe what slows you down. I reply within ~2h with a tailored proposal — within 24h at the latest.
HowIWork.step2Desc: I scope it, build it, test it and document it — with progress updates the whole way.
HowIWork.step3Desc: It runs on its own, and you see exactly how much time and money it saves.

Faq.title: Questions, answered
Faq.subtitle: Everything you'd ask on a first call — already answered.
Faq.a1: Most projects ship within a few days to two weeks. Your first workflow is guaranteed live within 5 days — or your money back.
Faq.q2: How does it work, start to finish?
Faq.a2: You send a short brief. I reply within ~2 hours with a tailored proposal (24h at the latest). Once you're happy, I build, test and document — then hand it over.
Faq.a3: You do — 100%. Code, accounts and credentials are yours, fully documented. No lock-in, no black box.
Faq.a4: Yes. Your data stays yours. I'm GDPR and Swiss nLPD compliant, sign an NDA on request, and never share or resell anything.
Faq.a5: Optional. A monthly retainer (from 150 CHF/month) covers monitoring, fixes and improvements. Or take the keys and run it yourself.

ServicesPage.title: Automation, end to end
ServicesPage.subtitle: One developer, one AI workforce. I scope it on a brief, build it in days, and hand you something that just runs.

automations.title: AI Automations
automations.long: Workflows that connect your apps and do the boring work for you — every hour, every day, without anyone clicking a button.
automations.outcome: Hours of manual work removed every week.

integrations.title: API Integrations
integrations.long: Stripe, Shopify, Notion, HubSpot, Google — I wire your tools together so data flows automatically instead of being copy-pasted.
integrations.outcome: One source of truth, zero double entry.

bots.title: Telegram & Discord Bots
bots.long: Bots that answer customers, send notifications and run commands — available 24/7 with the exact logic your business needs.

scraping.title: Web Scraping & Data
scraping.long: Collect, clean and structure data from any website on a schedule, delivered straight to your sheet, database or dashboard.

scripts.title: Python Scripts & Automation
scripts.long: Tailor-made scripts that eliminate a specific repetitive task — reports, file processing, reconciliations, batch jobs.
scripts.outcome: The task you dread, done in seconds.

webapps.title: Modern Web Apps
webapps.long: Fast, accessible web apps built with Next.js and React — dashboards, internal tools and customer-facing products.
webapps.outcome: A product that loads instantly and scales.

ServicesPage.processSubtitle: Simple, fast, and built to run without you.
ServicesPage.step1Desc: I map what slows you down and pick the highest-impact workflow to automate first.
ServicesPage.step2Desc: I build, test and document it — you get progress updates the whole way.
ServicesPage.step3Desc: It ships, it runs, and you see exactly how much time and money it saves.

LegalNotice.title: Legal Notice
LegalNotice.s1b: NeuroDevLab — an independent activity operated by Loan Schoch, based in Lausanne, Switzerland.
LegalNotice.s2b: By email (see below) — usually answered within ~2 hours.
LegalNotice.s3b: This site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA (vercel.com).
LegalNotice.s4b: Unless stated otherwise, all content, code and visuals on this site are the property of NeuroDevLab. Any reproduction without permission is prohibited.
LegalNotice.s5b: Information is provided in good faith but without warranty of completeness or accuracy. External links are not under my control and I'm not responsible for their content.
LegalNotice.s6b: This site is governed by Swiss law. Place of jurisdiction: Lausanne, Switzerland.
LegalNotice.s7b: See the Privacy Policy for how personal data is collected and handled (GDPR + Swiss nLPD).

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy
LegalPrivacy.intro: Your privacy matters. As a Swiss-based service I apply both the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nLPD / FADP). This page explains, in plain language, what I collect and why.
LegalPrivacy.s1b: NeuroDevLab — Loan Schoch, Lausanne, Switzerland. I am the data controller for this site. Contact details are at the bottom of this page.
LegalPrivacy.s2b: Only what you give me: when you send a brief or message, I collect your name, email, your description, and the optional project type, budget and volume fields. I do not collect any data you don't actively submit.
LegalPrivacy.s3b: To reply to you and prepare a proposal — i.e. your consent and pre-contractual steps at your request. I never sell or rent your data, and I don't use it for unrelated marketing.
LegalPrivacy.s4b: Text you type into the live demo is sent to a third-party AI provider to generate a response. Please don't paste personal or confidential information. I do not store demo conversations on my side.
LegalPrivacy.s5b: I use Plausible Analytics — cookieless and privacy-first. No cookies, no cross-site tracking; data is aggregated, anonymous, and hosted in the EU. There is nothing to consent to because nothing identifies you.
LegalPrivacy.s6b: A few trusted processors help run the site: Vercel (hosting), Resend (transactional email), Telegram (lead notification), a third-party AI provider (the live demo) and Plausible (analytics). Each handles data only as needed to provide its service.
LegalPrivacy.s7b: Brief and email exchanges are kept only as long as needed to handle your request and any resulting project, then deleted. You can ask me to delete them sooner at any time.
LegalPrivacy.s8b: You can access, correct, delete, restrict, port or object to the processing of your data. Just email me. You may also lodge a complaint with the Swiss Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC) or your local EU supervisory authority.
LegalPrivacy.s9b: This site sets no advertising or tracking cookies. Only strictly necessary technical storage is used.
LegalPrivacy.s10b: I may update this policy as the site evolves; the date above always reflects the latest version.

ExitIntent.title: Before you go
